_comment: Committen 用户配置示例。复制为 config.json 后修改,config.json 优先级高于本文件。
_whitelist_note: active-win 在 Windows 上对部分应用返回'显示名'(如 'Claude'、'Windows Explorer')而非 .exe 文件名,所以白名单同时包含两种形式才稳妥。
_gitRepo_note: Repos to watch for commits. Each commit feeds her +30. Accepts: 'auto' (auto-detect from cwd), an absolute path string, or an array. Examples — single auto: "auto" — single explicit: "D:\\proj" — multi: ["D:\\proj1", "D:\\proj2"] — mix: ["auto", "D:\\side-project"]

monitor._passive_note: Set passive=true to fully disable attack reactions (e.g., when recording demos / streaming). She'll still react to git commits and decay over time, but won't pounce on non-whitelist apps.
